changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert sample users with creation dates spread across last 30 days for growth chart visualization.
changeSet.sql:
-- Insert sample users with dates spread over 30 days -- Password: "TestPassword123!" (BCrypt hashed) INSERT INTO "user" (first_name, last_name, email, role, password, created_at, last_login, enabled, validated) VALUES -- Days 1-5 ('Alice', 'Anderson', 'alice.anderson@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Bob', 'Brown', 'bob.brown@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '29 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Carol', 'Clark', 'carol.clark@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '28 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('David', 'Davis', 'david.davis@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '27 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Eve', 'Evans', 'eve.evans@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '26 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true),
-- Days 6-10 ('Frank', 'Foster', 'frank.foster@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '25 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Grace', 'Garcia', 'grace.garcia@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '24 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Henry', 'Harris', 'henry.harris@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '22 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Ivy', 'Ingram', 'ivy.ingram@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '21 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Jack', 'Jackson', 'jack.jackson@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '20 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true),
-- Days 11-15 ('Kelly', 'King', 'kelly.king@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '19 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Leo', 'Lopez', 'leo.lopez@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '17 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Mia', 'Martinez', 'mia.martinez@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '16 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Noah', 'Nelson', 'noah.nelson@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '15 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Olivia', 'Owens', 'olivia.owens@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '14 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true),
-- Days 16-20 ('Paul', 'Parker', 'paul.parker@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '13 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Quinn', 'Quinn', 'quinn.quinn@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '12 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Rachel', 'Rodriguez', 'rachel.rodriguez@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '10 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Sam', 'Smith', 'sam.smith@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '9 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Tina', 'Taylor', 'tina.taylor@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '8 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true),
-- Days 21-25 ('Uma', 'Underwood', 'uma.underwood@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '7 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Victor', 'Valdez', 'victor.valdez@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '6 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Wendy', 'Watson', 'wendy.watson@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Xavier', 'Xu', 'xavier.xu@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '4 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Yara', 'Young', 'yara.young@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '3 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true),
-- Days 26-30 ('Zack', 'Zhang', 'zack.zhang@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '2 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Amy', 'Adams', 'amy.adams@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 day', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Ben', 'Baker', 'ben.baker@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '12 hours', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Chloe', 'Carter', 'chloe.carter@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '6 hours', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true), ('Daniel', 'Diaz', 'daniel.diaz@example.com', 'USER', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '2 hours', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert sample organizations with creation dates spread across last 30 days for growth chart visualization. Organizations are created by the first admin user (assumed to have id=1).
changeSet.sql:
-- Insert sample organizations with dates spread over 30 days -- Assumes admin user with id=1 exists (from bootstrap or previous setup) INSERT INTO organization (name, slug, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES -- Days 1-5 ('Acme Corporation', 'acme-corp', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 days'), ('Beta Industries', 'beta-industries', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '28 days'), ('Gamma Solutions', 'gamma-solutions', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '27 days'), ('Delta Technologies', 'delta-tech', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '26 days'),
-- Days 6-10 ('Epsilon Systems', 'epsilon-systems', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '25 days'), ('Zeta Ventures', 'zeta-ventures', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '23 days'), ('Theta Labs', 'theta-labs', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '21 days'), ('Iota Enterprises', 'iota-enterprises', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '20 days'),
-- Days 11-15 ('Kappa Holdings', 'kappa-holdings', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '18 days'), ('Lambda Group', 'lambda-group', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '16 days'), ('Mu Partners', 'mu-partners', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '15 days'), ('Nu Innovations', 'nu-innovations', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '14 days'),
-- Days 16-20 ('Xi Consulting', 'xi-consulting', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '12 days'), ('Omicron Digital', 'omicron-digital', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '10 days'), ('Pi Creative', 'pi-creative', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '9 days'),
-- Days 21-25 ('Rho Analytics', 'rho-analytics', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '7 days'), ('Sigma Dynamics', 'sigma-dynamics', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 days'), ('Tau Media', 'tau-media', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '4 days'),
-- Days 26-30 ('Upsilon Global', 'upsilon-global', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '2 days'), ('Phi Networks', 'phi-networks', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 day'), ('Chi Studios', 'chi-studios', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '12 hours');
